name: sr_l2_owner_approval_gates_send
notes: L2 is the default: a batch only proceeds after the owner's OWN reply (agents.approval_glue.apply_agent_decision: approved -> batch 'approved' -> customer_send's stack takes over). The deterministic fast-path classifier (owner_inputs.approval_reply.classify_approval_reply) reads a clear Hinglish 'haan ... bhej do' as APPROVED without ever needing an LLM guess (Pillar 7). Setup: `setup --onboarded --seed-lapsed-customers 8` then `script <tenant> sr_l2_owner_approval_gates_send.json`.

steps.message: purane customers ko wapas laane ke liye ek accha sa offer draft kar do unke liye
steps.note: First turn: a win-back ask should draft + arm an owner approval, not send anything yet.

steps.message: haan theek hai, bhej do unhe
steps.note: A clear Hinglish approval ('haan' is a strong-affirm token in owner_inputs.approval_reply's deterministic classifier). Expect the paused batch to resume -- the manager should NOT stay silent or fall back to the D1 boilerplate after a genuine owner approval.
